offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 orders/week, unfulfilled orders cause customer dissatisfaction. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking of orders and shipments.
problem: Unfulfilled orders leading to customer dissatisfaction
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Shopify sellers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Shopify sellers
try_it: Let users try weekly order alerts and manual entry for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
